content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 PerformYard: Account Executive Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America Virginia CRM, Product knowledge, SaaS, Salesforce, Email Handling, Deal Closure, and Communication Skills Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0066/9649/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Arlington, VA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://performyard.com">https://performyard.com</a> </p> <p>Ready to join a fast-growing and category-leading SaaS company? Do you want to be part of a fast-paced, focused environment and have a real impact on your company’s future? Do you want to sell an innovative product created by some of the best engineers on the planet? Are you looking for a company that will invest time in your development, support your professional growth, and listen to your ideas? If yes, then keep reading!</p> <p>PerformYard is a profitable, growth-stage B2B SaaS company transforming how organizations manage and measure employee performance. Our AI-enabled platform is widely adopted for its customizable performance processes, ease of use, and measurable business impact. As we scale, PerformYard has significant opportunities to accelerate growth by creating AI-native workflows, expanding into adjacent talent modules, and modernizing our user experience.</p> <p>As a PerformYard&nbsp;<strong>Account Executive (AE),</strong> you will close new business by managing a high-volume pipeline of prospects. You’ll need to generate new opportunities, close meetings with inbound leads, run effective sales calls and close enterprise customers in B2B SaaS. You will conduct demonstrations for and build relationships with senior executives at our target companies. The successful candidate will be a strongly self-motivated and driven individual who is goal-oriented, methodical and tenacious, and can effectively interact with a team. This position has advancement potential within the sales organization, and the compensation package includes an uncapped commission structure.</p> <p><strong>This is a 100% remote position- now &amp; forever</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Demonstrate the value of PerformYard in prospect meetings, sales calls and product demos</li> <li>Effectively manage a high volume of inbound leads</li> <li>Strategize with other top-producing sales reps and leadership</li> <li>Efficiently manage long-term relationships with prospect companies</li> <li>Understand prospects' needs and help them overcome their challenges</li> <li>Manage a large pipeline of interested organizations</li> <li>Maintain an accurate sales forecast on a weekly/monthly/annual basis and manage your personal sales pipeline</li> <li>Generate qualified meetings for yourself and partner with the dedicated team of Sales Development Representatives responsible for setting and qualifying meetings</li> <li>Leverage CRM tools and sales automation to constantly make yourself more efficient</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Bring:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor's Degree</li> <li>2+ years of experience in sales, account executive, business development, or account management roles</li> <li>At least 1+ year in a quota-carrying closing role, with demonstrated success meeting or exceeding targets</li> <li>Experience with the full life cycle of the sales process</li> <li>A demonstrated track record of success in a sales role</li> <li>A strong desire to learn and succeed in tech sales</li> <li>The ability to write crisp emails and present with a great phone presence</li> <li>Knowledge/Experience of/in any of the following industry sectors is a plus: Enterprise SaaS, HR SaaS, Talent Mgmt</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Bonus Points:</strong></p> <ul> <li>A desire to do and achieve brilliant things!</li> <li>Authentically curious, you love learning and improving yourself</li> <li>Integrity is fundamentally important to you</li> <li>You are organized and have excellent time management skills</li> <li>You want to make a real difference</li> <li>You are naturally entrepreneurial and street smart</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Sound like you? Apply now by clicking the link below!</p> <h2></h2> <p><strong>Benefits</strong></p> <div> <p>In addition to your compensation plan we also have medical, dental, and vision health insurance benefits w/ HSA plan, disability insurance, 401k plan, generous PTO, paid holidays and other benefits.</p> </div> <p>&nbsp;</p> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/performyard-account-executive">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/performyard-account-executive</a></p> Mon, 18 May 2026 17:47:22 +0000 Wed, 17 Jun 2026 17:47:22 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/performyard-account-executive https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/performyard-account-executive Arbostar: Sales Team Lead Anywhere in the World Ontario Sales Management, Sales Pitching, Team Management, and Sales Analytics Sales and Marketing Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5196/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Canada <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://arbostar.com/">https://arbostar.com/</a> </p> <p>ArboStar is a fast-growing SaaS platform helping tree care and landscaping companies streamline operations across North America. As we continue to scale, we’re looking for a Sales Team Lead to organize, lead, and develop our sales team while ensuring consistent performance and predictable growth.<br>This role is focused on team leadership, performance management, and enablement, with the expectation that the&nbsp;<strong>Sales Team Lead</strong>&nbsp;stays close enough to execution to effectively support team results when needed.
